title: I need dates in workflows
excerpt: Title. I need to compare date columns in if checks for workflows.

posts.author: MikeB_NPPM (Mike B)
posts.cookedHtml: Title. I need to compare date columns in if checks for workflows.

posts.author: rargenbright (Becca Argenbright)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, it’d be helpful to have “if date range is between ___ and __” or a similar option in workflow components.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MikeB_NPPM

If you’re looking to add date-based logic into your workflows, there are a couple of great options you can explore.

You can use the “Workflow Blocks: Formula” app from the Marketplace - it’s free and allows you to create more dynamic, formula-based conditions for dates within workflows.

If you need more advanced logic or conditional paths, I’d also recommend trying the Smart Condition Block inside the workflow builder. It gives you more flexibility when setting up complex triggers and criteria.

Both are solid options depending on how advanced you’d like your workflow to be.
